ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality measurement record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observed data */,
  "aqs_site_id" INTEGER /* AQS site identifier for the monitoring station */,
  "poc" INTEGER /* Parameter occurrence code */,
  "max_8hr_ozone" REAL /* Maximum 8-hour ozone concentration */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "daily_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Daily Air Quality Index value */,
  "daily_obs_count" INTEGER /* Daily observation count */,
  "percent_complete" INTEGER /* Percentage of data completeness for the day */,
  "aqs_parameter_code" INTEGER /* AQS parameter code indicating the type of pollutant */,
  "aqs_parameter_desc" TEXT /* Description of the AQS parameter */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Core-based statistical area code */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the CBSA */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code of the monitoring site */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code of the monitoring site */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating data quality issues */,
  "method_code" TEXT /* Code of the measurement method used */,
  "method_desc" TEXT /* Description of the measurement method */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time of measurement */,
  "local timezone" TEXT /* Local timezone of the monitoring site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_aqs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqs_site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("aqs_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "aqs_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the monitoring site */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* County code of the monitoring site */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the monitoring site (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use classification of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the monitoring site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqs_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for defining the parameter */,
  "parameter_desc" TEXT /* Description of the parameter being monitored */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., pollutant, meteorological) */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Description of the potential health impact of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code associated with the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsa" (
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each CBSA */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the core-based statistical area */,
  "cbsa_population" INTEGER /* Population of the CBSA */,
  "cbsa_area" REAL /* Area of the CBSA in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_aqi" (
  "aqi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQI record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the AQI record */,
  "aqs_site_id" INTEGER /* AQS site identifier */,
  "daily_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Daily AQI value */,
  "aqi_category" TEXT /* AQI category (e.g., good, moderate, unhealthy) */,
  "aqi_description" TEXT /* Description of the AQI category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_aqi_aqs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqs_site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("aqs_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "aqs_site_id" INTEGER /* AQS site identifier that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., High Ozone Levels) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_aqs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqs_site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("aqs_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Chemical, Optical) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of sensor installation */,
  "aqs_site_id" INTEGER /* AQS site identifier where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last sensor calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_aqs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqs_site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("aqs_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last user login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view data, generate report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor ID of the calibrated sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of sensor calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor ID of the maintained sensor */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of sensor maintenance */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("sensor_id")
)
